EnglishTitle: Seeking means through Imam Mahdi (a) in difficulties.
RUrduTitle: Pareshaani mein Imam Mahdi (a) se Tawassul.
UrduTitle: مشکلات کے وقت امام زمانہ (عج) سے توسل۔

EnglishDescription: One of our important duties is to pay attention and seek means through Imam Mahdi (a), especially at the time of hardships, extreme difficulties and the unbearable diseases which occur in a person s life. In such times, our obligation for the solution of the difficulties and to escape from them, is to seek means through Imam Mahdi (a) who is the guardian of our affairs.
RUrduDescription: Hamara sab se bada fareeza Imam-e-Asr (a) se tawassul aur unki taraf tawajjoh hai makhsoosan jab aisi mushkilaat aur pareshaaniyo’n ne insaan ko gher rakha ho keh jin se nikalna mushkil ho. Us waqt hamara fareeza hai keh un mushkilaat aur pareshaaniyo’n se bachne ke liye Imam-e-Zamana (a) se mutawassil ho, is liye keh hamari wilaayat unke haatho’n mein hai.

EnglishDescription: Therefore, in all entanglements, especially when our entire existence is occupied by helplessness and distress, we must seek means through the Avenger of the chosen ones of Allah, the Imam of Time (a), and we should understand that all these sufferings and miseries that occur in our lives are the impact of the occultation of his holiness (a). And we are obligated to supplicate for his reappearance.
RUrduDescription: Lehaaza mushkilaat aur bil-khusoos woh mushkilaat jis ne pareshaan kar rakha ho aur izteraab (pareshaani) ne hamare poore wajood ko apne andar samet liya ho to hamein chahiye keh Muntaqim Aale Muhammad (a) Imam-e-Asr (a) ki baargah mein panah haasil kare aur jin mushkilaat ka bhi hamein saamna karna padhta hai woh ghaibat ka nateejah hai, hamara fareeza hai keh Aan Hazrat (a) ke zahoor ke liye dua kare.

EnglishDescription: Majlis writes in Bihar ul Anwaar that: Abul Wafa Shirazi says: I was captured in a prison and was deeply troubled by my condition. Seeking the Infallible Imams as the means, I began to supplicate before Allah. When the eve of Friday arrived, I slept after offering prayer and saw Prophet (s) in my dream. Prophet (s) guided him in his dream as to how and through which Imam he should seek means for every demand? Then his holiness said…
RUrduDescription: Marhoom Allama Majlisi likhte hai; Abul Wafa Shirazi ka bayaan hai keh ham qaid mein thay aur bohot hi buri haalat mein thay, Parwardigaar-e-Aalam se uska shikwa kiya aur Ahle-Baiyt (a) se madad chaahi, shab-e-Juma namaz se faarigh ke baad jab soya to aalam-e-khwaab mein Rasool-e-Khuda (s) ki ziyarat ki. Paighambar-e-Islaam (s) khwaab mein unhe rehnumaayi karte hai keh kaunsi mushkil ke liye kis Imam (a) se mutawassil ho. Abul Wafa Shirazi kehte hai Rasool-e-Khuda (s) ne ham se farmaya…
UrduDescription: مرحوم علامہ مجلسی لکھتے ہیں ابوالوفاء شیرازی نے کہا میں قید خانہ میں تھا یہ چیز مجھ پر سخت گزری اپنی حالت کیلئے کدا سے شکایت کی اور اھلبیت سے مدد مانگی عالم خواب میں حضرت رسول کی خدمت میں حاضر ہوا پیغمبر عالم خواب میں اس کی راہنمائی کرتے ہیں کہ کس حاجت کے لئے کس طرح امام کو اپنا وسیلہ قرار دیں وہ کہتاہے کہ رسول خداؐ نے اس سے فرمایا۔۔۔

English: And as for the Master of Time (atfs), whenever the sword reaches your neck (and his holiness placed his hand on his throat), seek his help as he will surely help you.
RUrdu: Lekin Imam'e Zamana (atfs) jab bhi talwaar gardan tak pohonch jaaye to un se madad maango woh tumhari madad karenge.
Urdu: لیکن صاحب الزمان جب تلوار کے ساتھ قتل کی جگہ پر پہنچے اور اپنے ہاتھ کو حلق مبارک پر رکھیں تو اس سے مدد طلب کرو کہ وہ تمہاری مدد کرے گا۔
ArabicText1: وَاَمَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانْ فَاِذَابَلَغَ مِنْكَ السَّیْفِ الذِّبْحِ، فَاسْتَعِنْ بِهٖ، فَاِنَّهٗ یَعْ یعینك وَ وَضَعْ یده عَلٰی حَلْقِهٖ۔

EnglishDescription: Abul Wafa says I shouted in my dream…
RUrduDescription: Abul Wafa kehte hai, aalam-e-khwaab mein ham ne awaaz di…
UrduDescription: ابوالوفاء کہتاہے کہ عالم خواب میں آوازدی۔۔۔

English: O my Master, o Master of the Time, help me! My life is nearing its end.
ArabicText1: یَا مَوْلَایَ یَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانِ اَدْرِكْنِیْ فَقَدْ بَلغ مهجودی۔

EnglishDescription: And I woke up suddenly and witnessed that the jailer was opening my chain.
RUrduDescription: Abul Wafa kehte hai; neend se be-daar huwa to dekha qaid khaane ke andar hamari zanjeero’n ko khol rahe hai.
UrduDescription: وہ کہتاہے کہ میں خواب سے بیدار ہوا اس حالت میں تھا کہ مامورین میرے ہاتھ سے زنجیروں کو کھولتے تھے۔

EnglishDescription: In the book Salahul Momineen, the author says: My father said…
RUrduDescription: Saalehul Momeneen mein likhte hai; mere waalid uske mutaaliq farmaya…
UrduDescription: سلاح المومنین میں لکھتے ہیں کہ میرے پدر بزرگوار نے اس رابطہ میں کہا ہے۔۔۔

English: When the sword is placed on your neck, supplicate and seek help from your Master, Imam Mahdi (a.t.f.s), saying: “O Master of the Time! Come for my help, O Master of the Time, accept me.” He is Allah’s door, the Divine Mercy, the helper, and the son of the pride of all prophets.
RUrdu: Jab bhi talwaar tumhari gardan par ho to apne Mawla Hazrat Baqiyatullah se mutawassil ho aur kaho. “Ay Imam'e Zamana (a) hamari madad ko aaye, ay Saahebaz Zamaan (a) mujh tak pohonche.” Is liye keh woh Baabullah aur Rehmat'e Ilaahi hai woh sab ki madad karne waale aur fakr'e ambiya Hazrat Muhammad'e Mustafa (s) ke farzand hai.
Urdu: جس وقت تلوار تیرے گلے تک پہنچے تو اپنے مولیٰ حضرت حجت سے متوسل ہوجاؤ اور کہو اے صاحب الزمان ہماری فریاد کو پہنچو اے صاحب الزمان میری مدد کرو چونکہ وہ خدا کا دروازہ اور رحمت الٰہی ہے وہ سب کی فریاد کو پہنچنے والا ہے وہ فرزند پیغمبر حضرت محمد مصطفی ہے۔
ArabicText1: اِنْ دَنَا مِنْ نَحْرِكَ السَّیْفُ اسْتَغِثُ بِوَلِیِّ لْعَصْرِ مَوْلَاكَ وَقُلْ۔ یَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانِ اَغِثْنِیْ، یَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانَ اَدْرِكْنِیْ۔ فَهُوَ بَابُ اللهِ وَالرَّحْمَۃِ وَاَلْغَوْثُ وَابْنُ الْمُصْطَفٰی فَخْرِ الرُّسُلِ۔

EnglishDescription: Muhaddis e Noori says: Apparently the Prophet’s motive behind this word isn’t that a person should only seek Imam Mahdi (a) as his means at the time of entanglements by the hands of the enemies (whose intention is to kill and destroy you), but it hints towards this point that one should compulsorily seek him as his means whenever hardships reach their final extent, and all the material means and all hopes from the creations has vanished, and when man loses his patience. And it does not make a difference if the sufferings and calamities are religious or worldly, from the evil of humans or the Jinn. Therefore, the duty of a helpless and distressed person is to seek justice and help from the noble existence of Imam Mahdi (a), as all the accomplishments and supports come from the divine grades of his holiness.
RUrduDescription: Mohaddis-e-Noori farmate hai, Hazrat Rasool-e-Akram (s) ke kalaam se jo nateeja nikalta hai woh yeh hai keh, Hazrat baqiyatullah (a) se tawassul sirf usi waqt nahi hona chahiye keh jab woh aise dushman ke haatho’n giraftaar ho jo usey qatl karna chahta ho, bal-keh yeh ishaara hai yaani jab bhi tumhara kaam mushkil ho jaaye aur chaara masdood (bandh) ho kisi se ummeed na ho aur sabr o tahmul ki gunjaaish na rahe jaaye yeh balaaye’n aur mushkilaat chahe dunyawi ho ya deeni, dushman chahe Jinnaat ho ya Insaan har jagah Aan Hazrat (a) se mutawassil ho, aur yahi mafhoom is dua se bhi maaloom hota hai.
UrduDescription: جو کچھ رسول کے کلام سے ظاہر ہوتاہے یہ ہے کہ حضرت صاحب الزمان کو واسطہ قرار دینا صرف اس مقام کے ساتھ مخصوص نہیں ہے کہ انسان جب دشمن کے ہاتھ میں گرفتار ہوا اور وہ اس کو قتل کرنے کا قصد رکھتا ہو تب ہی کرے بلکہ یہ کنایہ ہے کہ جب بھی کوئی مشکل پیش آئے اور تمام اسباب ختم ہوجائیں اور لوگوں سے ناامید ہوجائے صبر اور تحمل کے لئے کوئی گنجائش نہ ہو چاہے دینی بلا ہو یا دنیوی ہو دشمن انسان ہو یا جن ہو ان تمام صورتوں میں حضرت حضت سے متوسل ہوجائے۔

EnglishDescription: If the distressed person cannot verbally express himself due to the seriousness of his distress and difficulties, and cannot recite the supplication reported from the Holy Progeny (a) and plead in their threshold, it is sufficient for him to seek help with his situational expression, i.e. to know and confirm that his holiness is his Guardian, Imam and spiritual Mentor, and the means of God s grace is none but his noble existence, and he is the only lamp of guidance in the darkness of occultation. Thus he should understand and recognize that those who plead in the holy journeys such as Hajj and Ziyarat, none but Imam Mahdi (a) helps them and delivers them from their hardships.
RUrduDescription: Lehaaza jis tarah muztar, majboor aur be-kasi ka fareeza hai Aan Hazrat (a) ke huzoor mein isteghasa kare, isi tarah majbooro’n aur be-kaso’n ki faryaad par pohonchna bhi Aan Hazrat (a) ka ilaahi mansab ke tahet fareeza hai. Agar koi muztarab o majboor apni zabaan se ya jo tawassul ki duwaae’n hai un ke zariye Hazrat ko na pukaar sakey lekin unki mohabbat dil mein aur unki wilaayat aur Imaamat ka iqraar karta ho, neez sirf us muqaddas o jood ko ghaibat ke taareek-e-bayaabaan mein ilaahi faiyz ka waasta samjhe to yahi uske liye kaafi hai keh woh khud zabaan-haal se isteghasa kare aur haajat bayaan kare. Lehaaza waazeh ho gaya keh tamaam majboori bil-khusoos woh jo Hajj o Ziyarat ke safar mein muztar ho unki siwaaye Hazrat Imam-e-Zamana (a) ke aur koi madad nahi karta.

EnglishDescription: The evidence that can be provided for this point is that one of the nicknames of his holiness (a) is Ghaws, which is mentioned in the authentic Ziyarats, and its meaning is one who comes for help. It is obvious that this god-gifted nickname is not just a name and naturally, the owner of this nickname should be able to hear our voices from whichever place he is called and in every language he is supplicated. In fact, he should have such knowledge which can help him dominate over the conditions of all the seekers of help and justice, irrespective of their supplications, just like it is mentioned in his letter addressed to Sheikh Mufeed.
RUrduDescription: Is matlub (in baato’n) ke upar gawah khud Aan Hazrat (a) ka laqab khaas “Ghaus” hai jo motabar ziyarato’n mein aaya hai, uske maani “Faryaad-rasi” (faryaad ko pohonchne waale) ke hai laqab sirf ism nahi hai bal-keh ism waaqe hai aur yeh haqeeqat (tehqeeq-shuda) nahi hoti magar yeh keh uska maalik us tarah ki soonne ki quwwat aur taaqat ka maalik ho keh jo bhi, jahan kahin bhi ho usey pukaare aur jis zabaan mein bhi pukaare usey soon le. Aisi firaasat (aql) ka maalik ho keh be-doon (bagair) isteghasa o faryaad majbooro’n aur be-kaso’n ke haalaat se poori tarah waaqefiyyat rakhta ho, lehaaza Aan Hazrat (a) aise hi maqaam ke maalik hai jaisa keh Shaikh Mufeed ko apne farmaan mein apne us mansab ki wazaahat farmaayi hai.

EnglishDescription: He has the power to deliver the seekers of help, in case of discretion, from the oceans of entanglements, irrespective of his condition and the language in which he is supplicated. No one is appropriate for this position but he who has the sublime status of Imamate and who possesses the grade of Guardianship.
RUrduDescription: Woh aisi qudrat ka maalik hai agar koi majboor zabaan-e-haal se najaat talab kar raha ho to usey bala ke gardaab (bhawar) se baahar nikaal sakey aur us maqaam ki siwaaye Imam (a) ke aur koi liyaaqat (salaahiyat) nahi rakhta ya phir woh jis ne wilaayat se rishta mazboot kar liya hai.

EnglishDescription: This point is confirmed by the traditional nickname, Aba Salih, with which he is called between the Arabs (both the urban Arabs and the bedoins). They do not seek him as means, and do not express their grievance in his threshold or supplicate to him, but with this noble name, ie. Aba Salih.
RUrduDescription: Hamare qaul par dusra gawah yeh keh aaraab aur baadya nasheeno (jo dar-ba-dar phir-te hai un) ke darmiyaan maaroof hai woh Hazrat (a) ki zaat-e-muqaddas ko “Aba Saaleh” se taabeer karte hai, apne tawassul, isteghaase aur shikaayat mein is ism ke siwa aur kisi ism se nahi pukaarte.

English: O Master of the Time! Come for my help, O Master of the Time, accept me.
RUrdu: Ay Imam'e Zamana (a) hamari madad ko aaye, ay Saahebaz Zamaan (a) mujh tak pohonche.
Urdu: اے  امام زمانہ (عج) ہماری مدد کو آئے، اے صاحب الزمان (عج) مجھ تک پہنچے۔
ArabicText1: یَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانِ اَغِثْنِیْ، یَاصَاحِبَ الزَّمَانَ اَدْرِكْنِیْ۔
